class.name: FmodAudioStreamFLAC
class.brief_description: Audio stream class for FLAC format files using FMOD.
class.description: FmodAudioStreamFLAC extends [FmodAudioStream] to provide support for FLAC (Free Lossless Audio Codec) files. FLAC is a lossless compression format that preserves original audio quality while reducing file size. This class uses sample-based loading by default ([constant FmodAudioStream.MODE_SAMPLE]), which loads the entire decoded audio into memory. This is ideal for FLAC files since they are typically used for high-quality audio where streaming is unnecessary and sample-based playback provides lower latency. The stream can be played using [FmodAudioStreamPlayer] or used directly with FMOD's channel system.

method.name: _create_sound
method.description: Overrides the parent [method FmodAudioStream._create_sound] to create the FMOD sound object for FLAC playback. This method is called internally when [method FmodAudioStream.get_sound] is first invoked. Returns an empty reference if no audio data is loaded or if the FMOD system is not available.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears the audio data and releases the internal [FmodSound] resource. This frees up memory and resets the stream to an empty state. The stream will need to be reloaded before it can be played again.

method.name: is_loop_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if looping is enabled for this FLAC stream, [code]false[/code] otherwise. Looping state is determined by the [constant FmodAudioStream.MODE_LOOP] or [constant FmodAudioStream.MODE_LOOP_BIDI] flags in [member FmodAudioStream.mode_flags].

members.member: Controls whether the FLAC audio should loop during playback. When set to [code]true[/code], the [constant FmodAudioStream.MODE_LOOP] flag is added to [member FmodAudioStream.mode_flags], enabling normal loop playback. When [code]false[/code], the loop flag is removed.
The starting position of the loop region in samples. When the audio reaches [member loop_end], it will jump back to this position to continue playback. Only applies when looping is enabled.

The ending position of the loop region in samples. When playback reaches this position, it will jump back to [member loop_begin]. A value of [code]-1[/code] means the loop ends at the natural end of the audio file. Only applies when looping is enabled.
